overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along a coastal highway. The player starts under a highway overpass, ascends brick stairs alongside a building, then continues along a dirt coastal path and concrete walkway next to the ocean while various vehicles pass on the highway. The weather is overcast with diffused natural lighting.

reaching the top of stairs and exiting the overpass shadow area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a highway overpass with a palm tree trunk in the foreground. The player ascends wide brick stairs alongside a stone building, passing from a semi-covered area into open daylight. Various vehicles including a large box truck pass on the highway to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal dirt path alongside highway with ocean view

events.description: moving from built structure onto natural coastal dirt and grass path
ocean becomes visible on the left beyond the vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path next to the highway with the ocean visible on the left

notable_agents.action: motorcycle speeding past on the highway

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and grass walking path along the coast
calm blue ocean visible beyond the coastal vegetation
wooden utility poles with multiple power lines running parallel to the road
steep rocky cliff rising above the highway

segments.scene_description: Leaving the building behind, the scene opens into a wide coastal area with a dirt path running alongside the highway. The ocean becomes visible on the left beyond scrub vegetation and power lines, while a rocky hillside rises on the right. A motorcycle speeds past on the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated concrete walkway with guardrails over coastal drainage

events.description: transitioning from dirt path onto concrete bridge walkway with metal guardrails
large white RV with blue stripes passes on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated concrete walkway with white metal guardrails, dense vegetation on the left

notable_agents.action: white RV with blue stripes driving along the highway

entered.detail: elevated concrete sidewalk with white painted surface

thick green bushes and shrubs between walkway and ocean

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions to a concrete walkway with white metal guardrails on the left, elevated above the coastal terrain. Dense vegetation fills the space between the walkway and the ocean, while various vehicles including a large RV pass on the highway to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved coastal highway sidewalk with residential area visible

events.description: approaching a curve in the highway and walkway
large red tanker truck navigates the curve on the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway as the highway curves, with residential houses now visible through the trees on the left

notable_agents.action: large red tanker truck with cylindrical trailer navigating the curve

entered.detail: white and beige residential buildings visible through the trees
tall curved street lamp along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues along a curving section of the highway, with residential houses now visible through the vegetation on the left. Heavy vehicle traffic including a large red tanker truck navigates the curve on the highway, while the white guardrail continues along the left side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the sheltered shadows of a highway overpass into an expansive, open coastal landscape. It begins by ascending wide brick stairs alongside a stone building, moving from a semi-covered area into the diffused daylight as a large box truck passes on the adjacent highway. As the building is left behind, the scene opens onto a dirt path where the ocean first becomes visible beyond scrub vegetation and power lines, while a motorcycle speeds past on the road. The terrain then transitions into an elevated concrete walkway with white metal guardrails, shifting the perspective above dense greenery and passing RVs. Finally, the path curves along the coastline, revealing residential houses tucked behind the vegetation as a large red tanker truck navigates the bend in the highway.
